embeds.title: Judas Difficulty 10 in 1 Turn w/ Mei Lin - Chaos Zero Nightmare
embeds.description:
1 turn clear, mei lin is actually exodia - pull her 6 card combo and you win. i didnt even realize 1 repose and her 6 cards was enough to just nuke both phases like this. also nia's curiosity is just so good for these low turn clears

stats / build / gear shown at end - none of veronica or nias gear
